history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, tousled hair and a friendly smile is captured in a medium shot, looking slightly to his left. He's wearing a simple olive green t-shirt. His arms are resting, with his left hand gently placed over his right. A black bracelet is visible on his left wrist, and a black watch on his right. He's seated at what appears to be an outdoor cafe or restaurant setting at night.

The background is dimly lit and somewhat blurred, suggesting a lively atmosphere. Behind him, trees with foliage are visible, illuminated by soft, warm lights that create a bokeh effect. Several motorcycles are parked in the background, adding to the urban, casual feel. To the left of the frame, another person is partially visible, wearing a white top and beige pants, bending over a table. The ground appears to be paved and slightly wet, reflecting some of the ambient light.

The overall style is candid and intimate, with a slightly grainy, vintage aesthetic due to the low light conditions and possibly film photography. The color palette is dominated by warm, muted tones – greens, browns, and the soft glow of yellow and orange lights, contrasted with the dark blues and blacks of the night. The mood is relaxed and convivial, hinting at a pleasant evening spent with friends.
